expectedEvidence.description: Land eligibility evidence showing the project area was degraded forest land before the project start date.
expectedEvidence.label: Degraded land classification records

expectedEvidence.description: Barrier or investment analysis records demonstrating additionality under the UNFCCC methodology requirements.
expectedEvidence.label: Additionality analysis package

rules.logic: Project restores degraded forest lands and demonstrates additionality using the UNFCCC barrier or investment analysis.
rules.title: Project restores degraded forest lands and meets additionality tests per Tool 01.
when: Target areas classified as degraded forest land prior to start date.
Additionality analysis completed per UNFCCC requirements.

expectedEvidence.description: Historical land-use and stratification records supporting the baseline net GHG removal estimate.
expectedEvidence.label: Baseline stratification package

expectedEvidence.description: Documentation supporting any default biomass or parameter selections used under Tool 02.
expectedEvidence.label: Default parameter justification

rules.logic: Baseline net removals estimated using historical land-use/land-cover data and default parameters from Tool 02.
rules.title: Baseline net GHG removals derived from historical land-use data per Tool 02 guidance.
when: Default biomass parameters justified when field data absent.

expectedEvidence.description: Fuel, biomass burning, and fertilizer activity records used to quantify project emissions.
expectedEvidence.label: Emission source activity logs

expectedEvidence.description: Calculation records showing how Tool 08 factors were applied to the project emissions inventory.
expectedEvidence.label: Tool 08 calculation workbook

rules.logic: Project emissions include fossil fuel consumption, biomass burning, and fertilizer use calculated with Tool 08 default factors.
rules.title: Project emissions include fossil fuel use, biomass burning, and fertilizer application as per Tool 08.
when: Fuel consumption metered or logged with auditable records.
Fertilizer application data retained for verification.

expectedEvidence.description: Annual leakage monitoring records and mitigation review materials covering activity-shifting and market effects.
expectedEvidence.label: Leakage monitoring review

expectedEvidence.description: Calculation records demonstrating how Tool 14 default factors were applied before issuance.
expectedEvidence.label: Leakage deduction calculations

rules.logic: Activity shifting and market leakage quantified annually with Tool 14 standardized coefficients.
rules.title: Leakage from activity shifting and market effects addressed using Tool 14 default factors.
when: Leakage monitoring plan implemented with annual review.
Leakage deductions applied before credit issuance.

expectedEvidence.description: Updated Tool 15 risk assessments supporting the non-permanence buffer determination.
expectedEvidence.label: Risk assessment

expectedEvidence.description: Registry or account records evidencing the buffer contribution entries retained for verification.
expectedEvidence.label: Buffer account records

rules.logic: Buffer contribution calculated with Tool 15 risk scoring and documented alongside issuance.
rules.title: Non-permanence buffer determined via Tool 15 risk analysis and recorded in registry accounts.
when: Updated risk assessment provided during verification.
Evidence of buffer account entries retained.

expectedEvidence.description: Archived plot coordinates and remeasurement records that allow the permanent sample plot network to be revisited.
expectedEvidence.label: Plot remeasurement records

expectedEvidence.description: Documented QA/QC procedures and checks applied to each monitoring campaign.
expectedEvidence.label: QA/QC procedures

rules.logic: Plot network re-measured at ≤5-year intervals using standard mensuration and Tool 16 QA/QC checks.
rules.title: Permanent sample plots re-measured at least every five years per Tool 16 QA/QC guidance.
when: Plot coordinates archived and accessible for re-measurement.
QA/QC procedures documented for each monitoring campaign.

expectedEvidence.description: The combined sampling uncertainty worksheet and supporting calculations provided during verification.
expectedEvidence.label: Uncertainty worksheet

expectedEvidence.description: Records showing any Tool 12 conservative deductions applied before credit issuance when the threshold is exceeded.
expectedEvidence.label: Deduction calculation records

rules.logic: Calculate combined sampling uncertainty and apply Tool 12 deductions when precision >10% at 90% confidence.
rules.title: Sampling uncertainty kept below 10% at 90% confidence or conservatively adjusted using Tool 12.
when: Deductions applied prior to credit issuance if threshold exceeded.

expectedEvidence.description: Monitoring report materials covering updated maps, field measurements, emission source logs, leakage deductions, and buffer transactions.
expectedEvidence.label: Monitoring report package

expectedEvidence.description: Version-controlled datasets with metadata that substantiate the monitoring report package and audit trail.
expectedEvidence.label: Versioned monitoring datasets

rules.logic: Monitoring reports include updated maps, field measurements, emission source logs, leakage deductions, and buffer transactions.
rules.title: Monitoring reports compile geospatial data, emissions sources, and buffer transactions with full audit trail.
when: DOE confirms completeness of supporting records.
